source_text: ROKA-TOP® 2 TOP-MOUNTED ROLLER SHUTTER BOXES 4 UNBEATABLE VARIETY OF THE CLASSIC TOP-MOUNTED BOX The variants from the ROKA-TOP® 2 series One product system, many advantages ROKA-TOP® 2 RG + Closed and jointless on the room side + Variable inspection opening + Screw connection between window frame and box + Two-piece aluminium guide rail system ROKA-TOP® 2 + Proven top-mounted box system + Closing cover with insulation and stepped rebate connection to reveal + On-site crossbars with own verification possible ROKA-TOP® 2 PLUS + Latest top-mounted box system with closing cover and adjustable reveal + Air-tightness guaranteed + Force-fit connection to the window frame – mounted in just one step Unique mounting concept Innovative hybrid foaming process Precisely preassembled Six metres from a single moulding Space-saving transport Integrated stabilising metal cage Fast installation Foamed-in end rails (optional extra profile) 1 2 5 FURTHER ADVANTAGES OF ROKA-TOP® 2 ROKA-TOP® 2 RG (closed on room side, inspection from outside) - highest thermal and acoustic parameters of any solutions used in this area - very high air-tightness and very good noise protection - option to install interior cover with plaster or tiles – no joints - broad range of applications – also for HS doors - equipped with steel reinforcement from a box length of 1.75 m – in any case according to the customer’s wishes - option to use an integrated stabilising bracket for HS doors and large window and roller shutter areas - compliance with wind resistance classes C4 and C3 - EN 1991-1-4 - use of reinforcements with amour partitions – installation by means of screwing to the lintel - no intervention from the room in case of motor failure – inspection from outside through guide rails - sealing of the window frame in the area of the guide rails – sealing against the ingress of moisture and better acoustic parameters - guide rails can be powder-coated or foil-wrapped to match the colour of the window profiles - option to use any drive method: motor, strap or crank Planning documents in the technical portal: https://www.beck-heun.tech/index.php/apps/files/?dir=/PLANUNGSUNTERLAGEN/AUFSATZK%C3%84STEN/ Rollladen/ROKA-TOP%202%20RG&fileid=8337 ROKA-TOP® 2 (inspection from inside) - highest thermal and acoustic parameters - wide range of applications - high torsional rigidity due to steel reinforcement in the box and aluminium carrier - option of additional stabilisation in the box by dividing the blind - simple and quick installation by placing the box on top of the window – metal hooks - no assembly at the company (fitting of blind and drive only) - it is not necessary to keep a stock of raw materials for the production - no production waste or waste due to design changes with PVC systems - complete top-mounted box with inspection from inside - very aesthetic closing profile - high rigidity and resistance to extreme temperatures – no deformation - high recognition of the Beck+Heun brand throughout Europe - option to use an insect screen - one universal side for all top-mounted boxes - maximum roll diameter for the armour in all boxes – roll diameter of 215 with box height 300, roll diameter of 185 with box height 250 - option to use any installation method - Roka Rubo square and semi-circular box available Planning documents in the technical portal: https://www.beck-heun.tech/index.php/apps/files/?dir=/PLANUNGSUNTERLAGEN/AUFSATZK%C3%84STEN/ Rollladen/ROKA-TOP%202&fileid=8248 All ROKA-TOP® 2 boxes – maximum stability thanks to integrated stabilising metal cage 6 ROKA-TOP® 2 PLUS has a completely closed Neopor® sealing level above the closing cover.

source_text: Low modulus silicone sealants are commonly used with PVC-U framing as they permit differential movement without loss of performance • Frame to structure gaps in excess of 6mm should have a firm closed cell backing strip supplied to avoid the use of excessive sealant and possible ‘sinking’ during the curing phase • Impregnated foam tapes can also be used for sealing, they should remain permanently flexible and accommodate joint movement of at least the same as a wet sealant.
target_text: Low modulus silicone sealants are commonly used with PVC-U framing due to their ability to allow differential movement without compromising performance. For frame-to-structure gaps larger than 6mm, a firm closed-cell backing strip should be supplied to prevent excessive sealant usage and potential "sinking" during the curing phase. Impregnated foam tapes can also be used for sealing; they must remain permanently flexible and accommodate joint movement equal to or greater than that of a wet sealant.

target_text: Furthermore, the prevention of overfilling in rooms with high humidity levels is necessary to prevent water from condensing and accumulating on surfaces such as windows or seals, which can lead to mold growth.

source_text: Des Weiteren verhindern Überschladichtungen in Räumen mit einer hohen Luftfeuchtigkeit, dass Wasser kondensiert und an z. B. Fenster oder Dichtung verhaart, was zu einer Schimmelbildung führen kann.
target_text: En outre, il est nécessaire d'empêcher les surcharges dans les espaces ayant une humidité élevée, afin d'éviter que l'eau s'affaisse et s'accumule sur des surfaces telles que les fenêtres ou les joints, ce qui peut entraîner la formation de mousse.
